title: MGN 702 (M) Amendment 1 Maritime autonomous surface ships of less than 2.5 metres in LOA
body: "Notice to all designers, builders, owners, operators, employers, crew, masters, remote operators and Certifying Authorities.    General Exemption for Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS) of Less than 2.5 Metres in Length Overall.   Notice to all designers, builders, owners, operators, employers, crew, masters, remote operators and Certifying Authorities.   "
